Title: Who am I?
Description: I am bachelor of Computer Science, major in Artificial Intelligence and Big Data. I am familiar with object oriented programming with primary focus on Java and python. I  have experience in web development using React and Node.js. Comfortable with database management using MySQL and MongoDB. I have a strong interest in AI and machine learning, and have experience working with TensorFlow and scikit-learn. I am a quick learner and always eager to take on new challenges.
